overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire releasing an eagle, crossing a wooden dock, wading through a river, and walking through a rural riverside settlement during golden hour. The environment features palm trees, mud-brick buildings, and ancient temple ruins across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow riverbank with ancient ruins visible across the water

events.description: eagle takes flight from character's arm and flies away into the sky

agents.ego_description: standing in shallow water holding an eagle on forearm, then releasing it to fly

notable_agents.action: eagle perched on character's arm then taking flight and flying away

entered.detail: stone temple structure with columns visible across the water
tall palm trees lining the distant shore
wooden platform extending into the water
green lily pads floating on water surface

segments.scene_description: The character stands in shallow river water during golden hour, holding an eagle that takes flight. Ancient temple ruins and palm trees frame the background across the water, while a wooden dock extends nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock crossing over the river

events.description: character steps out of water onto wooden dock
character reaches end of dock and prepares to enter water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wooden dock toward the opposite shore

entered.detail: thick wooden posts supporting the dock structure
coiled rope along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wooden dock extending over the river, passing thick wooden posts and rope railings. The ancient temple ruins remain visible ahead while the water lilies fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: river crossing with lily pads and reeds

events.description: character steps off dock into deeper water and begins wading across
character approaches riverbank and prepares to exit water

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep water toward the opposite shore

entered.detail: tall reeds and grasses on the approaching shore
wooden posts remaining in the water near the crossing

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the river water, moving away from the dock toward the opposite bank. Submerged wooden posts and riverbank vegetation become visible as the temple ruins shift to the left and palm trees draw closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy village path with mud-brick buildings and wooden structures

events.description: character exits water onto muddy riverbank and begins walking on land
passing wooden cart and entering denser village area with more buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along a muddy path through a rural settlement with palm trees and simple structures

entered.detail: simple rectangular building made of mud bricks with flat roof
wooden wagon structure with large wheels
muddy path with visible wagon tracks
low wall made of dried mud bricks

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the water onto a muddy path and walks through a rural Egyptian village. Mud-brick huts and walls line the path, with a wooden cart visible on the left. Palm trees tower nearby as the character continues along the wagon-tracked dirt road deeper into the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the edge of a river into the heart of a rural Egyptian settlement during the golden hour. It begins in the shallow water as the character releases an eagle into the air, with ancient temple ruins and palm trees framing the distant horizon. As the character moves, the scene shifts onto a wooden dock with rope railings before turning back toward the river to wade through water lilies and submerged posts. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the river onto a muddy path, leaving the water behind to enter a village of mud-brick huts. Finally, the view expands along a wagon-tracked dirt road, passing a wooden cart and towering palm trees as the character walks deeper into the settlement.
